who: restaurant kitchen managers processing 10-20 inventory reports/month
offer: For restaurant kitchen managers processing 10-20 inventory reports/month, inaccurate inventory reports cause overstocking and waste. We automate inventory usage reports instead of manual inventory tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory reports lead to overstocking and waste.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant kitchen managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory tools
DM 20-50 kitchen managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for kitchen managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of inventory data on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
